signals.headline: Polymarket XRP April Price Odds Shift | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket XRP April Price Odds Shift | NO | LOW confidence**  
Polymarket's "What price will XRP hit in April?" now leads at 74% for "↑ 1.40" (up from prior ~56%), with "↓ 1.20" at 27%; "XRP on April 20" favors 1.30-1.40 at 46%.[1][4][5] No explicit trigger confirmed in sources, but potential Senate CLARITY Act markup post-April 13 could catalyze if advanced (unconfirmed).[3]
